settings.name: Dent Removal
settings.description: Minor to major dent repair using precision tools. We reshape body panels without damaging the original paint wherever possible — from small door dings to large collision dents.

settings.name: Scratch Removal
settings.description: Deep scratch repair and clear-coat restoration. We assess scratch depth and apply the right technique — from machine polishing for surface marks to spot-paint for cut-through scratches.

settings.name: Panel Repainting
settings.description: Full single-panel or multi-panel repaint using computerized color matching. We blend your car's exact OEM shade — door, bumper, hood, fender, or full-body repaint available.

settings.name: Bumper Repair & Repaint
settings.description: Cracked, scuffed, or misaligned bumper repair. We handle both plastic and chrome bumpers — reshape, bond, and repaint to match the rest of the vehicle perfectly.

settings.title: Computerized Color Matching
settings.description: We use a spectrophotometer to read your car's exact OEM color code — zero guesswork, perfect blend every time.

settings.title: Dust-Free Paint Booth
settings.description: Every repaint happens in our controlled spray environment — no dust, no orange peel. Factory-quality finish guaranteed.

settings.title: Experienced Technicians
settings.description: Our team has worked on 500+ vehicles across all makes — from Suzuki and Toyota to imported luxury cars.

settings.title: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
settings.description: You get a written quote before we touch your car. Final bill matches — no hidden add-ons after the job.

settings.question: How long does car denting and painting take in Karachi?
settings.answer: Minor dent removal takes 1–2 hours. A single panel repaint typically takes 1 day including prep, painting, and curing.

settings.question: Can you match my car's exact paint color?
settings.answer: Yes — we use a computerized spectrophotometer to read your car's exact OEM color code and mix the paint to match precisely, so the repainted panel blends seamlessly with the rest of the car.

settings.question: How much does denting and painting cost in Karachi?
settings.answer: Minor dent removal starts from PKR 2,500 and a single panel repaint starts from PKR 8,000. Send us a WhatsApp photo of the damage for a quick, free estimate.

settings.question: Which areas of Karachi do you serve?
settings.answer: We serve customers from all areas of Karachi including DHA, Clifton, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, North Karachi, Federal B Area, Nazimabad, PECHS, Bahadurabad, Gulistan-e-Johar, Saddar, and surrounding areas.
